productDisplayName: Jealous 21 Women Jealous Gale Coral Top Grey Tops
description: Composition Black top made of viscose, with a wide V-neck at the front and back, medium sleeves, graphic print on left chest and rounded hem gathered at the sides   Fitting Regular Wash Care Machine wash or hand wash separately in mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring dry Dry in shade Medium iron, but do not iron on print Don the boho chic look in a really cool way with this trendy top from jealous 21. The wide V-neck allows you create an off-shoulder effect, while the graphic sketch of a rose on the left chest adds a stylish feminine vibe. Pair it with denims and heeled sandals for maximum style. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 5’9”; Chest: 33”; Shoulders: 15.5”
